title: calamintha officinalis f. menthifolia
intro: Calamintha officinalis f. menthifolia, also known as the mountain balm or lesser calamint, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high content of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Calamintha officinalis f. menthifolia include relief from digestive issues, reduction of stress and anxiety, and promotion of respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to alleviate various health issues and promote overall well-being.
